templates.name: Professional Services Agency
templates.description: A template for service teams that need client delivery, approvals, and fast knowledge capture.

starterGuidance: Invite account leads and assign one owner for each client workflow.
Hire your first delivery and finance agents to cover recurring admin work.
Upload proposals, service agreements, and SOPs as company knowledge.

templates.name: SaaS Operations
templates.description: A template for product teams running support, subscriptions, and internal operations from one workspace.

starterGuidance: Invite operations, finance, and customer success teammates.
Hire your first support and revenue operations agents.
Upload pricing plans, renewal playbooks, and product documentation.

templates.name: Healthcare Clinic
templates.description: A template for regulated teams that want a compliant default starting point.

starterGuidance: Invite administrators and clinical operations leads before expanding access.
Hire intake and scheduling agents with clear ownership boundaries.
Upload intake forms, SOPs, and approved policy documents.

templates.name: Technology Default
templates.description: Fallback defaults for technology companies before a more specific business type is chosen.

starterGuidance: Invite product, support, and finance stakeholders early.
Upload core product docs and operating procedures.
Choose a more specific business type later to tighten recommendations.

templates.name: Clinic Default
templates.description: Fallback defaults for clinic operators when the industry is still undecided.

starterGuidance: Invite clinical administrators before broadening workspace access.
Upload approved intake and scheduling procedures.
Upload intake forms, SOPs, and approved policy documents.

templates.name: Field Service Default
templates.description: A data-only template proving extra defaults and metadata flow without C# changes.

starterGuidance: Invite dispatch, operations, and finance leads first.
Upload scheduling rules, route standards, and service policies.
Use template metadata to shape future onboarding experiences without code changes.
